trending_videos.title: Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER GEKITOU Trailer
trending_videos.description:
The SUPER Brawl between Goku and Beerus!
At the end, Frieza is seen awaiting his resurrection ――

Series Premieres in Fall of 2026!
The anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus in Fall 2026!

#dragonball #dragonballsuper

◾️Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER Launch Trailer
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOmRInABehI

◾️INTRODUCTION
The globally beloved manga DRAGON BALL by Akira Toriyama continues to captivate fans through a wide range of media—from TV animation, movies, games, and merchandising—standing as a top-ranked title with extraordinary worldwide popularity. 
Now, in 2026, the anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus! This ENHANCED edition introduces a large volume of newly added and redrawn cuts, as well as a reconstructed narrative. With cutting-edge visual expression, the series

trending_videos.description: The Philadelphia Flyers and the Pittsburgh Penguins meet for the Eastern Conference Game 1 of the First Round at PPG Paints Arena. The teams split their four-game regular-season series 2-2. Sidney Crosby leads the Penguins with 74 points.

trending_videos.title: Avengers Doomsday Trailer Debrief & CinemaCon Recap | Sneak Peek
trending_videos.description:
Here’s everything Erik saw at CinemaCon this year, and the major takeaways from the Doomsday trailer! Get 10 free meals + a free Nutribullet Ultra Plus at https://www.hellofresh.com/newrockstars10fm

What happened BEHIND THE SCENES at CinemaCon while the Avengers Doomsday trailer played? Erik Voss spills all the secrets about the biggest news from CinemaCon 2026!

We're back at the UCB Theater in Los Angeles on April 17th, come in person or stream anywhere. Tickets: https://ucbcomedy.com/show/new-rockstars-live-its-morbin-time

genres.example_video: Axel Merryl 'je t'attendrai' Feat Santrinos Raphael (CLIP OFFICIEL)
genres.observation: Music videos continue to capture significant attention, potentially indicating strong viewer engagement when paired with popular artists or collaborations.

example_videos: DRAGON BALL XENOVERS 3 OFFICIAL REVEAL TRAILER REACTION!!
genres.observation: Gaming, particularly related to popular franchises like Dragon Ball, demonstrates high engagement, leveraging both official content and reaction videos.
Sports content, spanning different sports like golf and hockey, maintains a steady interest, likely driven by live events and major tournaments.

example_videos: AVENGERS DOOMSDAY TRAILER: Doctor Doom & X-Men Breakdown
Avengers Doomsday Trailer Debrief & CinemaCon Recap | Sneak Peek
genres.observation: Movie trailers and breakdowns, especially related to major franchises like Avengers, are trending, indicating a consistent appetite for speculative and recap content.
News and talk shows maintain a presence in trending, suggesting reliability in audience retention for current event discussions.

cross-genre popularity: Anime and Gaming cross-overs, such as 'Dragon Ball Super', show significant viewer interest, suggesting opportunities for content that bridges these themes.

creator_patterns.diversity: The top creators span a wide range of topics from music to gaming, indicating that diverse content strategies might be successful in capturing varied audience segments.
creator_patterns.opportunity_for_new_creators: Emerging creators can leverage existing popular genres such as music and gaming, potentially using collaboration or commentary formats to penetrate the market.

genre_expansion.gaming_and_anime: There is a notable opportunity for content that combines gaming and anime elements, catering to highly engaged fanbases of franchises like Dragon Ball.
genre_expansion.music_collaborations: Further exploration into music collaborations, especially with international artists, could capture cross-geographical audience interest.

content_format.reaction_videos: Reaction videos, particularly to gaming content, are trending. This format can be expanded to other genres such as movies and sports to capitalize on real-time engagement.

viewer_engagement.interactive_content: Creating interactive content such as live streams or Q&A sessions around trending topics can increase viewer engagement and retention.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
